input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.1.9 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.1.9
            TITLE: impact attenuator

            CONTENT:
            rule F.1.9: Impact Attenuator
F.1.9 Impact Attenuator 
A deformable, energy absorbing device located forward of the Front Bulkhead.

final_answer: rule F.1.9: Impact Attenuator F.1.9 Impact Attenuator A deformable, energy absorbing device located forward of the Front Bulkhead.
